categories.name: 大语言模型
categories.description: 通用对话和文本生成模型

models.title: Qwen-2.5-0.5B
models.description: 轻量级 Qwen2.5 指令模型，适合基础问答与文本生成场景。
models.descriptionEn: A lightweight Qwen2.5 instruction model for basic Q&A and text generation.

models.title: Qwen-2.5-1.5B
models.description: 轻量级通用大语言模型，适用于问答、摘要、文本生成与基础推理场景。
models.descriptionEn: A lightweight general-purpose LLM suitable for Q&A, summarization, text generation, and basic reasoning.

models.title: Qwen-2.5-3B
models.description: 中等参数规模的 Qwen2.5 指令模型，适合更复杂的文本生成任务。
models.descriptionEn: A mid-size Qwen2.5 instruction model for more capable text generation tasks.

models.title: Qwen-2.5-7B
models.description: 较高参数规模的 Qwen2.5 指令模型，适合复杂对话与生成任务。
models.descriptionEn: A larger Qwen2.5 instruction model for more complex dialogue and generation tasks.

models.title: Qwen-3-0.6B
models.description: Qwen3 0.6B 参数的基础量化模型。
models.descriptionEn: A quantized Qwen3 model with 0.6B parameters in Q4_0 format.

models.title: Qwen-3-0.6B
models.description: Qwen3 0.6B 参数的 Q4_1 量化模型。
models.descriptionEn: A Qwen3 model with 0.6B parameters and Q4_1 quantization.

models.title: Qwen-3-0.6B
models.description: Qwen3 0.6B 参数的 Q4_K_M 量化模型。
models.descriptionEn: A Qwen3 model with 0.6B parameters and Q4_K_M quantization.

models.title: Qwen-3-1.7B
models.description: Qwen3 1.7B 参数的高精度量化模型。
models.descriptionEn: A Qwen3 model with 1.7B parameters and Q8_0 quantization.

models.title: Qwen-3-4B
models.description: Qwen3 4B 参数的主流量化模型。
models.descriptionEn: A mainstream Qwen3 model with 4B parameters and Q4_K_M quantization.

models.title: Qwen-3-8B
models.description: Qwen3 8B 参数模型，适合更强的对话与推理任务。
models.descriptionEn: A Qwen3 model with 8B parameters and Q4_K_M quantization for stronger dialogue and reasoning.

models.title: Qwen-3-30B-A3B
models.description: Qwen3 30B 参数、激活 3B 专家的 MoE 模型。
models.descriptionEn: A Qwen3 Mixture-of-Experts model with 30B parameters, 3B activated experts, and Q4_0 quantization.

models.title: Qwen-3.5-0.8B
models.description: Qwen3.5 0.8B 参数的轻量量化模型。
models.descriptionEn: A lightweight Qwen3.5 model with 0.8B parameters and Q4_0 quantization.

models.title: Qwen-3.5-2B
models.description: Qwen3.5 2B 参数的轻量通用模型。
models.descriptionEn: A lightweight general-purpose Qwen3.5 model with 2B parameters and Q4_0 quantization.

models.title: Qwen-3.5-4B
models.description: Qwen3.5 4B 参数模型，适合通用文本理解与生成。
models.descriptionEn: A Qwen3.5 model with 4B parameters and Q4_0 quantization for general text understanding and generation.

models.title: LFM2-24B-A2B-Q4_0
models.description: LFM2 24B 参数、激活 2B 专家的 MoE 模型。
models.descriptionEn: An LFM2 Mixture-of-Experts model with 24B parameters, 2B activated experts, and Q4_0 quantization.

models.title: LFM2.5-1.2B-Instruct-Q4_0
models.description: LFM2.5 1.2B 指令微调模型。
models.descriptionEn: An instruction-tuned LFM2.5 model with 1.2B parameters and Q4_0 quantization.

models.title: SmallThinker-4B-A0.6B-Instruct
models.description: 面向推理优化的小型 MoE 指令模型。
models.descriptionEn: A small instruction-tuned MoE model optimized for reasoning.

models.title: DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B
models.description: DeepSeek-R1 蒸馏版 Qwen 1.5B 模型。
models.descriptionEn: A DeepSeek-R1 distilled model based on Qwen 1.5B with Q4_0 quantization.

models.title: GLM-Edge-1.5B-Chat
models.description: 面向边缘设备的轻量对话模型。
models.descriptionEn: A lightweight chat model designed for edge deployment.

categories.name: 多模态模型
categories.description: 图像理解和多模态对话模型

models.title: Qwen-3.5-0.8B
models.description: Qwen3.5 0.8B 轻量视觉语言模型。
models.descriptionEn: A lightweight Qwen3.5 vision-language model with 0.8B parameters.

models.title: Qwen-3.5-2B
models.description: Qwen3.5 2B 视觉语言模型。
models.descriptionEn: A Qwen3.5 vision-language model with 2B parameters.

models.title: Qwen-3.5-4B
models.description: Qwen3.5 4B 视觉语言模型。
models.descriptionEn: A Qwen3.5 vision-language model with 4B parameters.

models.title: Qwen-3-30B-A3B
models.description: Qwen3 30B 参数、激活 3B 专家的多模态 MoE 模型。
models.descriptionEn: A multimodal Qwen3 MoE model with 30B parameters, 3B activated experts, and Q4_1 quantization.

models.title: FastVLM-MM-0.5B
models.description: FastVLM 0.5B 轻量多模态模型。
models.descriptionEn: A lightweight multimodal FastVLM model with 0.5B parameters and Q4_1 quantization.

categories.name: 视觉模型
categories.description: 目标检测、分割、跟踪等视觉任务模型

models.title: YOLO11n
models.description: YOLO11 Nano 轻量目标检测模型。
models.descriptionEn: A YOLO11 Nano model for lightweight object detection.

models.title: YOLO11s
models.description: YOLO11 Small 目标检测模型。
models.descriptionEn: A YOLO11 Small model for object detection.

models.title: YOLO11m
models.description: YOLO11 Medium 目标检测模型。
models.descriptionEn: A YOLO11 Medium model for object detection.

models.title: YOLOv8n
models.description: 轻量级目标检测模型，可快速识别图像或视频中的目标类别与位置。
models.descriptionEn: A lightweight object detection model that quickly identifies object categories and locations in images or videos.

models.title: YOLOv8s
models.description: YOLOv8 Small 目标检测模型。
models.descriptionEn: A YOLOv8 Small model for object detection.

models.title: YOLOv8m
models.description: YOLOv8 Medium 目标检测模型。
models.descriptionEn: A YOLOv8 Medium model for object detection.

models.title: YOLOv8-Fire
models.description: 面向火焰检测场景的 YOLOv8 模型。
models.descriptionEn: A YOLOv8 model specialized for fire detection.

models.title: YOLOv5-Gesture
models.description: 面向手势识别场景的 YOLOv5 检测模型。
models.descriptionEn: A YOLOv5 detection model specialized for gesture recognition.

models.title: YOLOv5n-Face
models.description: 轻量级人脸检测模型。
models.descriptionEn: A lightweight face detection model based on YOLOv5n.

models.title: YOLOv8n-Pose
models.description: 轻量级人体姿态估计模型，可识别人身体关键点，用于动作理解与交互分析。
models.descriptionEn: A lightweight human pose estimation model that detects body keypoints for action understanding and interaction analysis.

models.title: YOLOv8s-Pose
models.description: YOLOv8 Small 姿态估计模型。
models.descriptionEn: A YOLOv8 Small pose estimation model.

models.title: YOLOv8m-Pose
models.description: YOLOv8 Medium 姿态估计模型。
models.descriptionEn: A YOLOv8 Medium pose estimation model.

models.title: YOLOv8n-Seg
models.description: 轻量实例分割模型。
models.descriptionEn: A lightweight instance segmentation model.

models.title: YOLOv8s-Seg
models.description: YOLOv8 Small 实例分割模型。
models.descriptionEn: A YOLOv8 Small instance segmentation model.

models.title: YOLOv8m-Seg
models.description: YOLOv8 Medium 实例分割模型。
models.descriptionEn: A YOLOv8 Medium instance segmentation model.

models.title: AVTrack-DeiT-Tiny
models.description: 音视频联合目标跟踪模型。
models.descriptionEn: An audio-visual target tracking model.

models.title: OC-SORT-YOLOXs
models.description: 多目标跟踪模型。
models.descriptionEn: A multi-object tracking model based on OC-SORT.

models.title: ArcFace-MobileFaceNet
models.description: 轻量级人脸特征提取模型。
models.descriptionEn: A lightweight ArcFace model for face feature extraction.

models.title: ST-GCN
models.description: 时空图卷积行为识别模型。
models.descriptionEn: A spatio-temporal graph convolution model for action recognition.

models.title: ResNet50
models.description: 经典图像分类模型，可对输入图像进行类别识别与特征提取。
models.descriptionEn: A classic image classification model for category recognition and feature extraction from input images.

models.title: Emotion-ResNet50
models.description: 面向情绪识别的 ResNet50 分类模型。
models.descriptionEn: A ResNet50-based classification model specialized for emotion recognition.

models.title: SenseVoice
models.description: 多语种语音理解模型，支持语音识别，并具备语言识别、情感识别等能力。
models.descriptionEn: A multilingual speech understanding model supporting ASR, language identification, and emotion recognition.

models.title: Qwen3-ASR-0.6B
models.description: Qwen3 0.6B 语音识别模型。
models.descriptionEn: A Qwen3 ASR model with 0.6B parameters and dynamic Q4_0 quantization.

models.title: Matcha-TTS
models.description: 高效文本转语音模型，可将文本自然合成为语音输出。
models.descriptionEn: An efficient text-to-speech model that naturally synthesizes text into speech output.

models.title: Matcha Icefall EN-US
models.description: 英语 LJSpeech 数据集版 Matcha 声学模型。
models.descriptionEn: A Matcha acoustic model trained on the English LJSpeech dataset.

models.title: Matcha Icefall ZH-Baker
models.description: 中文 Baker 数据集版 Matcha 声学模型。
models.descriptionEn: A Matcha acoustic model trained on the Chinese Baker dataset.

models.title: Matcha Icefall ZH-EN
models.description: 中英双语 Matcha 声学模型。
models.descriptionEn: A bilingual Chinese-English Matcha acoustic model.
